body: This PR removes CUDA as a direct dependency, since it's no longer needed. In order to instantiate environments with CUDA, I've added `ClimaAtmos.jl/cuda_env/Project.toml`, and added CUDA and ClimaCore (without a specified version) as a dependency. This way, it will sync with whatever version is specified in ClimaCore. I'm not sure if this is the best way to do this, so I'm open to other suggestions!
title: Remove CUDA as direct dependency
